codeReview.summary: This fix feature correctly addresses the two non-blocking issues from the prior round 1 scrutiny of docs-mainline-legacy-doc-reconciliation. Inline NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banners were added to both docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md and docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md. The banners point to the correct canonical replacements: frontend-handoff-finance.md points to docs/frontend-portals/ and docs/frontend-api/ (matching INDEX.md line 101), and accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md points to docs/frontend-portals/accounting/ (matching INDEX.md line 102). All canonical target files exist and are populated. The diff is minimal and surgical — only 15 lines added across 2 files, no deletions or modifications to existing content. Both ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh and ci/check-enterprise-policy.sh passed.

issues.description: Banner links use relative paths without the ../ prefix (e.g., 'frontend-portals/README.md' instead of '../frontend-portals/README.md'). This works because GitHub renders these correctly from the docs/ directory context, and the prior art in frontend-handoff-platform.md uses '../frontend-portals/README.md' format. Both approaches resolve correctly on GitHub, but the inconsistency in relative path style between the new banners (no ../) and the original banners (with ../) is a minor cosmetic difference.

summary: PASS. The fix correctly addresses both non-blocking issues from the prior scrutiny round. Both docs/frontend-handoff-finance.md and docs/accounting-portal-frontend-engineer-handoff.md now carry inline NON-CANONICAL / REFERENCE ONLY banners that match their declared legacy status in docs/INDEX.md. The banners point to the correct canonical replacements (docs/frontend-portals/ and docs/frontend-api/ for finance; docs/frontend-portals/accounting/ for accounting-portal), and all target files exist. This closes the consistency gap identified in the round 1 synthesis. One minor non-blocking note: the new banners use slightly different relative path formatting (no ../ prefix) compared to the banners in the other legacy handoff files, but both resolve correctly.
